data.title: WealthReach Launches Attract, an AI-Powered SEO and AEO Engine for Financial Advisors
data.description: In New York, a recent report highlights the creation of SEO- and AEO-optimized landing pages to attract potential customers. These pages are tailored to local markets and specific services being sought by users. This strategy aims to enhance visibility and engagement.

data.title: Willow Named to Fast Company's Annual List of The World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: In San Francisco on March 25, 2026, Willow Innovations, Inc., a trailblazer in maternal health and known for revolutionizing breast pumping technology, announced its inclusion in Fast Company's prestigious list of the World's Most Innovative Companies for 2026. This recognition serves as a testament to the company's continued dedication to innovation and advancement in the field.

data.title: Mac Murchadha Bespoke Financing Launches with New Research on $33B Sports Card Asset Class
data.description: Ensuring Institutional-Level Precision in Providing Liquidity Solutions for Private and Illiquid Assets NEW YORK, 3/26/2026 - Mac Murchadha Bespoke Financing has unveiled its official debut, offering expert advisory services tailored to design liquidity solutions for investors. Through this launch, the company aims to cater to the increasing demand for structured liquidity options, leveraging its specialized expertise to navigate the complexities of private and illiquid assets sectors.

data.title: Wellesley Asset Management Launches the Miller Convertible Total Return ETF (MCVT)
data.description: Wellesley Asset Management, Inc., a prominent investment advisory firm known for convertible securities, has introduced a new actively managed ETF on March 25, 2026. This ETF aims to optimize total return through investments in convertible securities. Based in Portsmouth, N.H., the firm is focusing on maximizing returns for investors through this new ETF.

data.title: Moxie Platforms Launches to Rewire Organic Growth by Mobilizing Women Across Generations and Engaging the Next Generation of Talent and Investors
data.description: In New York, Moxie Platforms, a fast-growing company founded by Candice Richards, has officially launched. This company specializes in creating custom events, platforms, and initiatives aimed at enhancing female representation and boosting business development. Candice Richards, a former lawyer and Managing Director at MidOcean Partners, established Moxie with the goal of revolutionizing programming for professional women in sectors like asset management and wealth management.

data.title: DreamHost Expands Global Infrastructure with Singapore Data Center
data.description: In Los Angeles, DreamHost has expanded its global infrastructure by adding a data center in Singapore. This move aims to bolster support for advanced AI tools like Remixer, which is a conversational website builder. This expansion demonstrates DreamHost’s commitment to enhancing its technological capabilities on a global scale.

data.title: Reolink Introduces the Solar Floodlight Cam During Its Annual Spring Event, Offering Smart AI-Powered, Wire-free Outdoor Security at a Special Price
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Reolink, a leading company in smart visual technology for residential and commercial use, unveiled the Solar Floodlight Cam as part of its Annual Spring Sale. This new camera model is being offered at a discounted rate along with various other promotions during the sale. No specific numbers were provided.

data.title: Joi + Blokes Expands Platform with Fertility Division Led by Serial Founder Gina Bartasi
data.description: Nashville-based precision health platform Joi + Blokes has recently merged with YourJOY.ai, a company founded by Gina Bartasi. This strategic integration aims to incorporate fertility services into Joi + Blokes’ existing focus on diagnostics and hormone optimization. Bartasi, who previously launched and expanded Kindbody and Progyny, has raised an impressive $325 million in capital for accessible fertility care. This move signifies a significant expansion for Joi + Blokes and its commitment to personalized healthcare solutions.

data.title: Next-Gen K-Beauty Brand Dr.BRID C Unveils "40,000ft Barrier Collection" with Up to 40% Off Spring Promotion
data.description: Dr.BRID C, a renowned brand known for its cream formulated to withstand the extreme dryness of airplane cabins, is currently promoting a special offer for the US spring shopping season. Customers can avail of a discount of up to 40% on the brand's entire range of barrier-care products. The promotion is effective in various stores in both New York and Seoul, South Korea. This offer is available from March 25, 2026, onwards and aims at providing customers with high-quality skincare solutions at reduced prices during the spring season.

data.title: McGraw Hill and T-Mobile Team Up to Help School Districts Bridge the Digital Divide and Improve Learning Outcomes
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, McGraw Hill, Inc. (NYSE: MH) unveiled a partnership with T-Mobile to address the digital disparity in education. The collaboration aims to link classrooms, homes, and communities for improved learning results for students. McGraw Hill, a prominent provider of educational resources for preK-12, higher education, and professional development, will merge its digital learning tools with T-Mobile's services in this initiative. This joint effort seeks to enhance educational outcomes by integrating technology in the learning process.

data.title: XDC Network Builds on Early Plug and Play Momentum with Expansion into DeFi
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California, on March 25, 2026, Plug and Play announced the inclusion of 11 start-ups in the XDC DeFi Accelerator program. This initiative aims to pave the way for the future of on-chain finance by harnessing the innovative capabilities of these start-ups. The program represents the third installment in the series under the XDC Network Accelerator, following the success of the initial two programs with Real World Asset (RWA) integration.

data.title: New study shows Kansas City University generates nearly half a billion in economic impact annually
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri, on March 25, 2026, Kansas City University (KCU), a private non-profit health sciences university present in Kansas City and Joplin, Missouri, revealed findings from an economic impact assessment done by consulting company Tripp Umbach. The analysis provided insights into...

data.title: Job Seekers Are Redefining Career Priorities in 2026, New Aerotek Report Shows
data.description: A recent survey revealed that 37% of workers quit their jobs because of unsatisfactory company culture or management. On the other hand, optimism is growing among skilled trades workers, leading to shifts in hiring trends. The data was collected by Aerotek, a prominent provider of manufacturing and logistics workplace solutions. This information was announced in Hanover, Maryland on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Voyager Commends NASA and Administrator Isaacman for Bold and Visionary Directives on Lunar, LEO and Deep Space Initiatives
data.description: In Denver, Voyager Technologies (NYSE: VOYG) is well-prepared to assist NASA’s Ignition event goals regarding a lasting lunar presence, commercial low-Earth orbit, and deep space exploration. The company's focus aligns with NASA's revised objectives as outlined, emphasizing a permanent lunar presence and advancements in expandable habitat technology. Voyager Technologies' strategic initiatives include a lunar project set for February 2026 and ongoing development of the Starlab system to facilitate these missions effectively.
